method.name: is_enabled
method.description: Checks if the extension is enabled or not.

members.member: Specifies how the projection layer should be rendered to external outputs. This setting will have [b]no effect[/b] on the projection layer when viewed from inside the device, but will take effect when casting to another device.

constants.constant: Display the content without any changes to external outputs.
Hide this composition layer from external outputs, revealing content behind it.
Replace the content on this composition layer with a black screen.
